title: JaredH4+
body:
!['JaredH4+' in Minecraft's title style with the words 'Made by JaredH4!' as a splash text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uF2ja6Yg/images/d5d3d395a9893d0b97354e59bb023f7451da2ccb.png)
Simple Vanilla+ Improvements!

This Pack Changes Carved Pumpkins and Jack o'Lanterns to Have a New More Classic Design.

It Also Makes Targets, Barriers and Structure Voids Have a New Rounder Shape,
Light Blocks Now Have Roman Numerals, and The End's Sky Now Has Stars.

Additionally, Redstone Dust's Texture Now Completely Connects, Enchanting Tables Have a Slightly Different Design,
and Many More Things Now Have New Improved Textures Fitting in with Minecraft's Style.

It Also Has Varieted Snow Golems Inspired by Grian and a Technoblade Pig (Both Require Entity Texture Features or Optifine)

Hope You Enjoy It!
